topic: Diligent Migration Content Review & Bug Fixes
summary:
Adam and Krista conducted a detailed working session reviewing the Diligent website migration, going through specific content and technical issues. Krista had worked through about half of the 56 content items flagged by Diligent for missing images, content, and links. They identified several patterns: many items Diligent flagged as missing (forms, CTAs) didn't actually exist on the live site, and Diligent hadn't re-reviewed items Adam had already addressed. Table of contents components were missing from guides but weren't in the original Figma designs.

A significant technical discussion covered the migration workflow - changes should NOT be made in the migration Sanity instance (they'd get overwritten). Instead: minor fixes noted for post-final-migration, pages needing full rebuild done in the Last Rev Sanity instance, and a content freeze period planned before go-live. They debugged a black border/scrollbar issue on the terms and conditions page (caused by overflow:scroll CSS), identified font size mismatches (15px vs 16px), and discussed AI background mapping issues where non-AI pages had AI-styled backgrounds.

They also covered pages needing full rebuilds (board-ready reporting LP, showcase page), the custom comparison table component that was added after migration started, and the plan for the Elevate 2026 page. Adam was in the middle of converting the header/footer from Tailwind to their style patterns for Sanity management.
keyDiscussionPoints: Half of 56 flagged content items reviewed - many were false flags
Diligent not re-reviewing items Adam already fixed
Table of contents not in Figma designs - not missing, just not designed
Migration workflow: don't edit migration Sanity, use LR Sanity for rebuilds
Content freeze needed before final migration and go-live
Terms & conditions black border caused by overflow:scroll CSS
Font size mismatch: 15px vs 16px on TOC items
AI background mapping issue on non-AI pages
Pages needing full rebuild: board-ready reporting LP, showcase
Custom comparison table added after migration started - needs reimplementation
Header/footer Tailwind conversion to Sanity-managed styles in progress
Copy-paste between Sanity instances works for components
Elevate 2026 page and virtual summit pages still need work
Form variants and different form versions need verification
decisions: Do not make changes in migration Sanity instance - they'll be overwritten
Full page rebuilds go in Last Rev Sanity instance
Minor fixes noted as 'revisit after final migration'
Content freeze before go-live with dual-update period
Pages with wrong AI backgrounds: quick follow-up to change hero background after migration
Diligent team handles full page recreations where components don't align
Focus on fixing broken items, not adding scope (no TOC additions)

actionItems.action: Fix overflow:scroll CSS causing black border on terms page
Continue content entry review for remaining 28 items
Assign full-rebuild pages to Diligent team
Log security/support module banner bug (links not red, oversized)
Log 'Let's Make an Impact Together' module bug
Ask Diligent about AI background on non-AI pages mapping

followUp: Diligent's timeline question for bug fixes and content entry completion
